Notes: NOTE: If the unit has below 5000 hrs in the first 5 years, the unit can be reevaluated and extended for another year, but not to exceed 4200 hrs. At 6 years if the unit has not hit 4200 hours it can be reevaluated and extended another year to 7 years, but not to exceed 3400 hrs. NOTE: MANDATORY REPLACEMENT AT 5000 FH OR 7 YEARS.
